data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Family of Richard Rogers/
data.description: Richard Rogers, an influential Texas entrepreneur known for his role in developing the Dallas-headquartered Mary Kay Cosmetics alongside his mother, has passed away at the age of 82. This information was shared in a news release by the Family of Richard Rogers on 01-Apr-2026. It's important to highlight that corrections have been implemented in the initial announcement.

data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. to Expand Elfa International as a Global Growth Platform Under Existing Leadership
data.description: In Murray, Utah, Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. (NYSE: BBBY) revealed intentions to expand Elfa as a key growth platform within its Home Services Pillar. The company signed definitive agreements with The Container Store and Closet Works to facilitate this expansion. Elfa, established in 1948 in Stockholm, Sweden, is renowned globally for its modular storage and organization solutions, including customizable closet systems and shelving options. This move aims to drive growth and innovation within the company.

data.title: Ukraine's Digital Resilience Lab for Web3 receives $500K commitment from Binance, in partnership with Lviv IT Cluster and Ministry of Digital Transformation.
data.description: Ukraine's Ministry of Digital Transformation and Lviv IT Cluster have joined forces with Binance in a partnership aimed at boosting the Web3 ecosystem. As part of this initiative, Binance has committed $500,000 to set up the Digital Resilience Lab. This lab is expected to play a crucial role in supporting the growth of the Web3 ecosystem through various activities and initiatives.

data.title: Soluna buys $53M wind farm for AI facility as it diversifies from crypto mining to AI, reflecting industry trend.
data.description: In 2024, Soluna made a strategic move into artificial intelligence to offset decreasing profits from its cryptocurrency mining operations. This decision reflects the broader trend in the industry towards focusing on AI tasks.

data.title: Coinbase gets OK for US trust charter through OCC, a year after Jonathan Gould became head.
data.description: On Thursday, the Chief Legal Officer, Paul Grewal, shared news of the approval, expressing gratitude towards Jonathan Gould, the newly appointed head of the OCC. Gould assumed the role less than a year ago.

data.title: Poor Performance Criteria Can Undermine Employee Trust, McLean & Company Tells HR Leaders
data.description: Many organizations are facing challenges in defining criteria for performance management that align with modern work conditions and enable equitable talent decisions. Recent research from McLean & Company, a renowned global HR research and advisory firm, underscores the negative impacts of inadequately structured criteria on talent-related choices.

data.title: Hello Kitty® and Bruno Mars Are Back!
data.description: The highly anticipated team is back, starting off Bruno Mars' newest tour with special merchandise, opportunities for fans to meet Hello Kitty, cafe events, and more LOS ANGELES, April 2, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Sanrio®, the renowned lifestyle company behind the iconic Hello Kitty®, has exciting news to share with fans. Get ready for exclusive merchandise and chances to meet Hello Kitty herself as part of Bruno Mars' latest tour. Don't miss out on cafe activations and other surprises in store.

data.title: OpenEvidence and Tandem Partner to Streamline Evidence-Based Prescribing and Prior Authorizations
data.description: In Miami and New York, a company called OpenEvidence is revolutionizing clinical decision-making with evidence-based solutions, while Tandem is streamlining the process from prescription to patient care. This partnership aims to enhance medical practices by leveraging data-driven insights and automated workflows.

data.description: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, a decrease of 0.2% compared to last month. It also shows that the economy added 200,000 new jobs in various industries. The labor force participation rate remains stable at 62.7%. Additionally, the average hourly earnings have increased by 2.8% year-over-year. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the job market and economic growth, providing a promising outlook for the future.

data.title: Management Controls Announced as 2026 CIO 100 Award Winner
data.description: In Houston, Foundry's Chief Information Officer has announced Management Controls, Inc. (MCi) as a recipient of the prestigious 2026 CIO 100 Award. This award, which has been acknowledging innovative organizations for over four decades, highlights those demonstrating exceptional strategic and operational excellence in information technology. Richard Smith, the Head of Event Content for CIO 100 Awards & Conference, emphasized that this year's awardees are not only maintaining operations but also advancing the business with technologies such as AI, data, security, and cloud.
